response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong testing culture, mentoring through workshops, and exposure to distributed systems (Sociomantic, millions of HTTP req/s). However, the role requires 8 years of C++ programming, and the resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015). Core stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not C++. The candidate does not meet the hard minimum qualification for this Technical Lead — Cloud Compute Platform position.
strengths: Strong distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic (high-throughput, low-latency micro-services)
Demonstrated mentoring and technical leadership via workshops, dojos, and courses
Long track record of shipping production software across diverse stacks and domains
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale cloud architecture experience
No formal Tech Lead title or evidence of leading multi-team technical strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / production cloud architecture background
